description: This video explains the Lightning Network, a second layer payment protocol designed to enhance Bitcoin's scalability by enabling faster and cheaper transactions through user-generated payment channels.
topic_summary: The Lightning Network addresses Bitcoin's transaction speed limitations [t=36:31] by allowing off-chain transactions through bi-directional payment channels [t=50:63]. It facilitates instant payments even without direct channels between users [t=143:70]. However, it requires on-chain transactions to open and close channels [t=183:16].
